seoTitle: Nana Glen vs Nangus — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nana Glen and Nangus. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Nana Glen vs Nangus: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nana Glen and Nangus.
heading: Nana Glen vs Nangus — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nana Glen, New South Wales and Nangus, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nangus has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Nana Glen (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nana Glen or Nangus safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nana Glen has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Nangus scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nana Glen scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Nangus scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nana Glen or Nangus?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nangus has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
